ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team is participating */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "actual_npg" INTEGER /* Number of actual non-penalty goals scored by the player */,
  "npg_per_90" REAL /* Average non-penalty goals scored per 90 minutes */,
  "shots_per_90" REAL /* Average number of shots taken per 90 minutes */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected number of goals based on shot quality */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_conceded_per_90" REAL /* Average number of goals conceded per 90 minutes (for defenders) */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "key_passes_per_90" REAL /* Average number of key passes made per 90 minutes */,
  "dribbles_per_90" REAL /* Average number of dribbles attempted per 90 minutes */,
  "successful_dribbles_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful dribbles */,
  "aerials_won_per_90" REAL /* Average number of aerials won per 90 minutes */,
  "tackles_per_90" REAL /* Average number of tackles made per 90 minutes */,
  "interceptions_per_90" REAL /* Average number of interceptions made per 90 minutes */,
  "clearances_per_90" REAL /* Average number of clearances made per 90 minutes */,
  "blocks_per_90" REAL /* Average number of blocks made per 90 minutes */,
  "fouls_per_90" REAL /* Average number of fouls committed per 90 minutes */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Average player rating based on performance */,
  "team_rating" REAL /* Average team rating based on performance */,
  "opponent_rating" REAL /* Average opponent rating based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's tenure with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's tenure with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)
